# ML Slides in french

**Content (verbatim)**

Last year, I was running a reading group in our lab. Here are the [slides](http://emotion.inrialpes.fr/~dangauthier/MLWGStuff/) in french.

Just one concerns bayesian stuff (mine, uhuhhu), and all are introductions to some sub-subjects of machine learning.
